ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank account */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who owns the account */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank where the account is held */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of bank account (e.g., Savings, Checking) */,
  "account_open_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the bank account */,
  "account_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the bank account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the bank account (e.g., Active, Dormant) */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the location is located */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" INTEGER /* Type of location (e.g., Rural, Urban) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "location_population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "location_economic_status" TEXT /* Economic status of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_location_type FOREIGN KEY ("location_type") REFERENCES location_types ("location_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who is the head of the household */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the household */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Annual income of the household */,
  "household_composition" TEXT /* Composition of the household (e.g., number of adults, children) */,
  "household_education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level in the household */,
  "household_employment_status" TEXT /* Primary employment status in the household */,
  "household_assets" TEXT /* List of household assets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "education_field" TEXT /* Field of education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  "employment_industry" TEXT /* Industry of employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "marital_status_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationship_with_head" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship type */,
  "relationship_with_head" TEXT /* Name of the relationship type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship type */,
  "relationship_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  "location_type_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)
